General.Name: Man Yue Technology Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Man Yue Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in technology electronic components and raw materials. The company offers aluminum electrolytic capacitors for information technology, telecommunications, electrical, and electronic brands; conductive polymer aluminum solid capacitors; and other electronic components, as well as electric double layer capacitors, MLPC, power film, and module. It also manufactures, processes, and sells electronic components, chemical materials, and raw materials; and trades in equity investments. The company sells its products under the SAMXON and X-CON brands. It operates in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Taiwan, Southeast Asia, Korea, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Man Yue International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Man Yue Technology Holdings Limited in January 2011. Man Yue Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Cosco Tower, Grand Millennium Plaza, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
